calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-12-2017 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-17-2017 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-17-2017 Continued To Jun-12-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Hung Tran appeared by telephone for Dorothy Chau.

Mr. Tran stated that he is working with the bonding company for the $6,933,000.00 bond, that the bonding company is in the process of coming up with a bill and that he will pay it as soon as he gets the invoice. Mr. Tran also stated that the $678,000.00 major expense to Cho Kwan were for liens on the three properties, that he will send in the liens and the deed of reconveyance, that they were personal loans that were recorded and that they have the promissory notes. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc.is continued to June 12, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court stated that the funds can remain in the five banks.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Tim Kneis. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-05-2017 Continued To May-17-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kevin Chiu appeared by telephone for Dorothy Chau (Petitioner).

Mr. Chiu stated that there is no Notice of Proposed Action for two of the properties, that he plans to obtain a waiver from the Beneficiary, that the property sold for close to the appraised value, that the reason the amounts of the proceeds are different is because of the Estate taxes that were paid and that all of the funds are in one bank account at Wells Fargo. The Court informed Counsel that original bank statements are needed to verify cash on hand for the current month, that he needs to break out the bank account into several banks, that closing escrow statements are needed on all of the properties and that Proof of Mailing of Notice to Creditor's to the Franchise Tax Board is also needed. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is continued to May 17, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
